programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A mother seeks justice for her deceased daughter as she claims that her son-in-law stole money out of her daughter's bank account. But the son-in-law claims it was a joint bank account and does not ow.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing LA
programme.sub-title: It's a Mad Mad Madison World
programme.desc: Madison returns with a Malibu beachside listing that needs his help after sitting stale for a year.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: The Rome getaway continues as the women process Brandi's claims against Denise. While Kyle and Dorit attempt to work through their constant clashes.

programme.sub-title: It's a Mad Mad Madison World
programme.desc: Madison returns with a Malibu beachside listing that needs his help after sitting stale for a year.

programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium With Tyler Henry
programme.sub-title: Melissa Joan Hart, Madison Beer, Snooki Follow-up
programme.desc: Melissa Joan Hart is a sceptic turned believer when a hidden family secret is revealed.

programme.title: Judge Rinder
programme.desc: Arbitration show in which real small-claims cases are adjudicated over within a studio courtroom by Judge Robert Rinder.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: The Rome getaway continues as the women process Brandi's claims against Denise. While Kyle and Dorit attempt to work through their constant clashes.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A woman's dog was viciously attacked by a pit bull and eventually died. She's now left with medical bills and emotionally distraught. She hopes to seek justice for her pet and is suing the defendant.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Guests include Dwayne Johnson, Henry Winkler, FINNEAS & Ashe and musical guest The Favors.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: The trip to Rome may be coming to an end, but the conflict continues. While a Vespa ride reminds Kyle and Dorit just how much fun they can have together.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing LA
programme.desc: Josh Altman and Josh Flagg have an explosive showdown at the Brits' Tower Lane property. Josh Altman celebrates the launch of his book.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: Mexican top model Carmen Campuzano visits the doctors in hopes of restoring her nose - and career; a discharged soldier wants to mend her butchered breasts to fit in as a civilian.

programme.title: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: After hearing about a religious cult stockpiling weapons on an isolated farm outside Rulo, Nebraska, FBI agents cultivate an informant.

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: Imrul joins the housemates in the Hamptons. Lindsay reveals the gender of her baby with help from Danielle. Paige confronts Kyle about his texts to her and everyone takes sides.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A small town church is stunned when a parishioner is murdered, in a stunning twist the suspect pool is drawn directly from the church walls.

programme.title: Fatal Family Feuds
programme.desc: A horrifying hit and run leaves two women near death and their families blaming each other. The search for the truth leads detectives on a massive hunt for a father who can't bear to witness his daugh.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Kyle and Dorit surprise Teddi with a baby shower, but Brandi reveals a few surprises of her own. Denise and Garcelle lament over how they think Lisa has changed.

programme.desc: After months of waiting, James and David's St Ives listing is ready to hit the market, but tensions with the seller may cause them to walk away from the listing.

programme.desc: Dr Dubrow helps an eating disorder survivor feel beautiful in her own skin by downsizing her breasts; Dr Nassif sends a 'dinosaur' nose back to the Jurassic era.
